problem: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs?
mechanism: Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins
hypothesis: If Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins is applied to neural, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
